name: Blue Ribbon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3 (8 ounce) packages cream cheese, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and sugar. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
3. Beat together the cream cheese and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Blend in the melted butter and orange extract.
4. Turn the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes.
5. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely.
6. Refrigerate for at least 12 hours before serving.
7. Remove the sides of the pan.
8. Garnish with grated orange peel.
9. Serve chilled.
